summary: Aligned the opening-ceremony countdown with the chapter plan and shifted the closing handoff toward documented accountability so the chapter no longer exits on the same institutional-wrongness beat as the previous chapter.
edits: Changed the countdown reference from four months to five weeks to match the outline-level timing pressure.
Revised the final lines to land on Petra's demanded written accounting and Tomas's still-closed door instead of repeating Chapter 14's building-gone-wrong exit shape.
